pi_items.source: Task description directly instructs saving to this exact path.
Task description directly instructs saving the text report to this exact path.
Task description requires 'One Sample T-Test', which corresponds to JASP's internal TTestOneSample module. Verified via JASP QML source.
Downloaded Exam Anxiety.csv from official JASP repository and verified that 'Exam' is a valid column. Task description explicitly requires this variable.
Task description directly requests a test value of 50.
Task description explicitly specifies unchecking Student, checking Wilcoxon, and enabling the Location parameter and Confidence interval. Verified against JASP's TTestOneSample QML options.

privileged_info_summary: The dataset 'Exam Anxiety.csv' is a real public dataset downloaded from the official JASP repository. Independent Python and R verification confirms the 'Exam' variable exists and contains valid numerical scores. A one-sample Wilcoxon signed-rank test on the 'Exam' variable against a test value of 50 yields a p-value of approximately 0.0129 and a Hodges-Lehmann estimate of 57.50. The required JASP analysis settings (TTestOneSample, Wilcoxon enabled, Student disabled, Location parameter and Confidence interval enabled) precisely match both the metadata and the task description. Expected output file paths align perfectly with the task description requirements.
